title: I asked you to be my girlfriend
text: Everything started on this day. I was nervous, you were beautiful, and somehow the universe lined everything up perfectly. This was the beginning of the best chapter of my life.

title: El Son de los Grillos
text: The same day my love, I'll never forget that restaurant, after you say yes to me and that beautiful place, with the decoration and your dress, I was in love with you since the moment I saw you, but that day I was sure that I wanted to be with you forever.

title: Our Birthdays
text: We had our birthdays the same month my love, I received a lot of letters from you that are still there in the little box that you paint for me, I got to know you mom and giving your a colors saying 'For the one that gives color to my life'.

title: Tough month
text: Well my love, this month was a little hard for us, there were a lot of things going on our lives. A thing to remark here it's that Kali Uchis announced her concert on Colombia and I got you the tickets for it.

title: Breakpoint
text: This month, I think it's a breakpoint for our life together, everything could have gone wrong, I don't really like to  talk about this month, it's a dark point on our history.

title: Everything is Better
text: After the storm, after everything, we gave us a second opportunity to try to share everything together, and I think that was the best decision we could have made, we are better together, we are stronger together, and we are happier now.

title: Christmas Together?
text: Well, it was our first December, each one with its families, I got to know you family better and spend time with them, I think that was a really good experience, and I hope we can share many more Christmas together. What about trying to do something this year to share christmas together? I know we have our families, but I think we can do something together, our maybe try to share christmas with both families, I don't know, but I think it would be really nice.

title: Our First Concert
text: The results of the tickets I got you for Kali Uchis were really good, we had a lot of fun, we danced, we sang, and we enjoyed every moment together. It was a night to remember and I think that make you really happy.

title: Current Year Summary
text: Honey, we have been together this year, some bad things happened, we had many arguments, but I think that make us what we are right now, we are a very strong couple now, we have our differences I know, but I think we got to respect each other and try to understand each other, we also know each other family's better, we had some trips together, and I think that was a really good experience for us, I hope we can improve everything we do right now to become the couple each one dreams of, I know we are not perfect, but I think we are perfect for each other, and that's what matters.

title: One Year Together
text: 365 days. 365 reasons to be grateful. You've made this past year the most meaningful of my life. Thank you for choosing me, every single day, every single moment. I can't wait to see what the future holds for us, but I know that as long as we're together, it will be amazing.
